starting_from_scratch_links: New to NaturaList? Download a template below to get started, and read the documentation to see how to fill in your data.
check_assets_size2: When enabled, linked media files are checked to make sure they are not too large. This may add some time when your spreadsheet has many media links.
url_public_hint: Paste the direct download address of your .xlsx file.
url_convert_gdrive_sheets: This looks like a Google Sheets sharing link. Convert it to a direct download address?
url_convert_gdrive_file: This looks like a Google Drive sharing link. Convert it to a direct download address?
url_convert_dropbox: This looks like a Dropbox sharing link. Convert it to a direct download address?
static_hosting_cors_notice: This app is running on a server that cannot fetch files on your behalf. Whether loading from a web address works depends on how the spreadsheet's server is configured, not on NaturaList - you are welcome to try, but it may not work in all cases.
static_hosting_cors_acknowledge: Understood - show me the address field
static_hosting_cors_reminder: Note: loading from a web address may be blocked by your browser depending on the spreadsheet server's settings
file_tracking_active: Saved changes will be picked up automatically
file_tracking_inactive: Choose the updated file to rebuild after making changes
url_will_need_reload: After updating the spreadsheet at its address, click Reload to refresh
this_may_take_time: This may take a moment, especially for large spreadsheets.
dwc_compiling_hint: Checking your export settings and assembling the archive.
result_dirty_file_tracking: Correct the issues in your spreadsheet and save the file - the app will detect your changes and rebuild automatically.
result_dirty_file_fallback: Correct the issues in your spreadsheet, then choose the updated file to rebuild.
result_dirty_url: Correct the issues in your spreadsheet, update the file at its address, then click Reload.
result_ok_intro: Everything looks good. Your data are shown as a draft preview. Publish when you are happy.
review_draft_hint: The checklist now shows a draft of your update. Browse it to check everything looks right, then come back here to publish.
dwc_export_configured: Your spreadsheet includes a Darwin Core export configuration.
dwc_compile_invitation: Click below to validate the export and build the archive. This step is optional - you can publish the checklist without it.
dwc_export_ready: The data export was built successfully.
dwc_export_has_errors: The data export completed with issues. See the messages below for details.
dwc_rebuild_after_errors: Once you have corrected the issues in your spreadsheet and rebuilt the checklist above, click here to try the data export again.
enter_creds_to_publish: Enter your credentials to publish the update. It will be available to your users shortly after.
download_for_manual_update:
Download the compiled data file and place it in the **usercontent/data** folder on your server.

See the [publishing documentation](https://naturalist.netlify.app/author-guide/publishing) for more details.
update_published: Your update is now live and will be available to users shortly.
error_publishing: The update could not be published
wrong_filetype: That file type is not supported. Please choose an Excel spreadsheet (.xlsx).
upload_disabled: Direct publishing is not available on this server. Use the manual download option instead.
no_credentials_received: No credentials were received by the server.
auth_failed: Authentication failed. Please check your username and password.
ssl_required: A secure connection (HTTPS) is required to publish directly.
rate_limit_exceeded: Too many failed attempts. Please wait 10 minutes before trying again.
proxy_fetch_failed: The server could not retrieve the spreadsheet from the provided address.
proxy_forbidden: Proxy access is restricted to requests from the same server.
proxy_invalid_url: Please provide a valid HTTP or HTTPS address.
config_format_error: Server configuration error: credentials.php is not formatted correctly. Please contact your administrator.
url_invalid: That doesn’t look like a valid web address.
url_fetch_failed: The file could not be loaded. Make sure the address is correct and the file is publicly accessible. If you are hosting it yourself, check that your server allows cross-origin requests.
url_fetching_direct: Retrieving spreadsheet directly (browser security restrictions may apply)…
server_returned_odd_message: The server returned an unexpected response. You may need to adjust your server configuration or contact the app author.
demo_card_description: This is a demo. Load one of the example projects to see NaturaList in action.
data_upload_import_dirty: Some issues in your spreadsheet need to be addressed before you can proceed:
fix_and_reupload_description: Address the issues shown below and reload the spreadsheet.
